content.text:
This view gives me an excellent picture of atom C:10 and all its connections. Based on my thorough inspection from multiple angles, here are my findings:

## Neighbour Atoms of Atom C:10

Atom **C:10** is covalently bonded to the following **4 atoms**:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|:---:|:---:|
| 7 | C |
| 11 | C |
| 32 | H |
| 33 | H |

**Explanation:**
- **C:7** — bonded below C:10 (part of the carbon chain)
- **C:11** — bonded above C:10 (connecting to the carbonyl group with O:12)
- **H:32** — hydrogen attached to C:10 (partially hidden behind C:10 in some views)
- **H:33** — hydrogen attached to C:10 (visible to the left)

This is consistent with C:10 being a **sp³ CH₂** (methylene) carbon with 4 single bonds.

**geomconf_index: 2129**

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
